heading: Covering into Commonwealth treasury of tax proceeds collected pursuant to Covenant
label: 1842 Covering into Commonwealth treasury of tax proceeds collected pursuant to Covenant
text: The Secretary shall take such steps as are necessary to ensure that the proceeds of taxes collected under the provisions of sections 601, 602, 603, and 604 of the Covenant () are covered directly upon collection into the treasury of the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands.Public Law 94–241
notes: References in TextThe Covenant, referred to in text, is the Covenant to Establish a Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands in Political Union with the United States of America, which is contained in , set out as a note under .section 1 of Pub. L. 94–241section 1801 of this title, referred to in text, is , , , as amended, which is classified generally to subchapter I (§ 1801 et seq.) of this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Public Law 94–241Pub. L. 94–24190 Stat. 263Mar. 24, 1976
